Contracts

Law & Agreements

Plain-language breakdowns of the frameworks, deals, and terms governing the digital world.

## Why Contracts Matter The agreements that govern digital life — terms of service, open source licences, platform policies, data-sharing deals — are among the most consequential documents most people never read. We read them, then explain what they actually mean. --- ## Our Sections ### [Digital Law](/contracts/digital-law/) Legislation, regulation, and case law shaping how technology operates. GDPR, CCPA, the DSA — the rules are changing fast. ### [Open Source](/contracts/open-source/) Licences, governance models, and the legal foundations of collaborative software. From MIT to AGPL. ### [Platform Terms](/contracts/platform-terms/) The terms of service governing the platforms we all use. What they say, what they mean, what changed. --- ## Our Method We are not lawyers. We are careful readers who work with legal advisors to ensure accuracy. Always consult a qualified solicitor for legal advice. [Subscribe for updates →](/subscribe/)
